title: Kattazhagu Karuvaachi Lyrics in Tamil
stanzas:
Kattazhagu Karuvaachi Lyrics in Tamil from Kalvan Movie sung by GV Prakash Kumar கட்டழகு கருவாச்சி
உன்மேல காதல் வந்து உருவாச்சு
கண்ணால கண்ணி வச்சி
கன்னி உன்ன கண்ணுக்குள்ள
சொக்க வச்சேன்

பனிமலையா நீ
எம்மேலே படறணும்
பூஞ்செடியாக உன்மேல வளரணும்
வளர்றனும், மகிழனும்
ஆனந்தத்தில் நான் கொண்டாடனும்

கல்லு மனச என்னசெஞ்ச
அல்லி மலர் போல ஆயிடிச்சே
உன் நெனப்பு நித்தம் வந்து
சாம கோழியா கூவிடுச்சே

நீ அச்சுவெல்லாம் வாங்கி
என்னோட பேச
கெட்ட வார்த்தை எல்லாம்
விட்டேனாடி

என்ன பெத்த வாசம்
உன்மேல வீச
உச்சி வானம் தோட்டெனடி.
சொன்னபடி கேட்கும்
நல்ல புள்ளையானேன்
என்ன விட்டு நீயும் போகாதடி

கட்டழகு கருவாச்சி
உன்மேல காதல் வந்து உருவாச்சு
கண்ணால கண்ணி வச்சி
கன்னி உன்ன கண்ணுக்குள்ள
சொக்க வச்சேன்

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kattazhagu Karuvaachi?

The song is a romantic melody that expresses deep love and affection.

Who is the singer of this song?

GV Prakash Kumar is the singer of this beautiful track.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics were penned by Maya Mahalingam.

What emotions does the song evoke?

The song evokes feelings of love, happiness, and celebration.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kattazhagu Karuvaachi is a romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and joy. Sung by GV Prakash Kumar, the song features heartfelt lyrics by Maya Mahalingam, creating a perfect blend of emotion and melody. The song conveys a sense of celebration and happiness, making it ideal for romantic occasions. Its soothing tune and expressive lyrics make it a memorable addition to any playlist.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kattazhagu Karuvaachi from the movie Kalvan is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of romance and joy. Sung by the talented GV Prakash Kumar, this song beautifully blends heartfelt lyrics by Maya Mahalingam with soulful music. Experience the magic of love with this enchanting track that promises to leave you spellbound.
stanzaMeanings: Kattazhagu Karuvaachi, love has formed for you. I have set my eyes on you, and made you fall for me.
Like a mountain of snow, you should fall on me. Like a small plant, you should grow on me, grow and be happy, and I should celebrate in joy.
What did you do to my stone heart? It became like a jasmine flower. Your thoughts come daily and make me sing like a rooster.
You took all my fears and talked to me, so I left all the bad words.
The fragrance that gave birth to me blows on you, the sky touches you. I became a good child who listens, so don't leave me.
Kattazhagu Karuvaachi, love has formed for you. I have set my eyes on you, and made you fall for me.

Kattazhagu Karuvaachi, love has formed for you. I have set my eyes on you, and made you fall for me.
